tasks.label: Run Current Java File
tasks.command: chcp 65001; Get-ChildItem -Path "${workspaceFolder}" -Recurse -Filter *.class -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; javac -encoding UTF-8 "${file}"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { java "-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8" -cp "${fileDirname}" "${fileBasenameNoExtension}" }

tasks.label: Compile Current Java File
tasks.command: chcp 65001; Get-ChildItem -Path "${workspaceFolder}" -Recurse -Filter *.class -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; javac -encoding UTF-8 "${file}"
